summary: Frontend-only marketing site for Bongio Barber tested end-to-end via Playwright on desktop (1440px), tablet (768px) and mobile (390px). All 32 critical UI/integration assertions passed: page loads with 0 console errors, navbar sticky, all data-testid CTAs render with correct hrefs (reservaUrl, sociosUrl, wa.me/5492915341108, Instagram, Google Maps), 9 service cards, 3 barber cards, 6 benefit cards, 12 gallery items with working filter (Fades shows 2), mobile hamburger opens/closes and auto-closes on link click, all 7 anchor sections (#inicio, #servicios, #barberos, #galeria, #socios, #ubicacion, #contacto) present and scroll correctly, footer year is dynamic 2026, no horizontal overflow.

issues: The 'Made with Emergent' badge in the bottom-right partially overlays the floating WhatsApp button label on desktop. The button is still clickable but visual overlap may be perceived; consider raising z-index or repositioning. Low priority — Emergent badge is platform-managed.

critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean, modular, all data centralized in /app/frontend/src/data/site.js as requested.
All external links use target=_blank and rel=noopener noreferrer (security best-practice respected).
Footer year computed dynamically (new Date().getFullYear()) — currently shows 2026.
Gallery filter test-id slug includes accented character: data-testid='nav-galería' (works but selectors with special chars can be fragile in some tooling). Optional: slugify to 'galeria'.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this project
seed_data_creation: None — static data lives in site.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only React+Tailwind marketing site. Public URL: https://barber-bahia-blanca.preview.emergentagent.com . All interactive elements use data-testid attributes per request. Mobile breakpoint for hamburger is lg (<1024px), so 768px tablet still shows hamburger (this is intended and matches request). Gallery filter testids are lowercased Spanish category names: gallery-filter-todo, gallery-filter-cortes, gallery-filter-fades, gallery-filter-barbas, gallery-filter-backstage, gallery-filter-local, gallery-filter-detalles. Nav desktop testids include accent: nav-galería (use exact match).
